book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.

classification.cautionReason: No major mainstream heresy warning is attached by the preview classifier.

lineage: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
That it is of small account to be baptized and to receive the Eucharist, unless one profit by it both in deeds and works.

title: That it is of small account to be baptized and to receive the Eucharist, unless one profit by it both in deeds and works.

source.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That it is of small account to be baptized and to receive the Eucharist, unless one profit by it both in deeds and works.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In the first Epistle of Paul to the Corinthians: “Know ye not, that they which run in a race run indeed all, although one receiveth the prize?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: So run, that ye may obtain.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: And those indeed that they may receive a corruptible crown, but we an incorruptible.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In the Gospel according to Matthew: “Every tree that bringeth not forth good fruit shall be cut down, and cast into the fire.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the same place: “Many shall say unto me in that day, Lord, Lord, have we not prophesied in Thy name, and in Thy name have cast out devils, and in Thy name have done great works?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: And then shall I say to them, I never knew you; depart from me, ye who work iniquity.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the same place: “Let your light shine before men, that they may see your good works, and glorify your Father which is in heaven.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also Paul to the Philippians: “Shine as lights in the world.”
